requirements.summary: Create a landing page with welcome message and navigation structure
acceptanceCriteria: Basic navigation structure is in place

file_operations.description: Set up the main App component with routing structure and navigation. Include a route for the landing page and ensure the core-infrastructure component is used for backend connection setup.

Create the landing page component with a prominent welcome message for InstaBhai App. Include basic navigation links to demonstrate the navigation structure. Use shadcn-ui components for consistent UI elements.
Create a reusable navigation component that can be used across pages. Use shadcn-ui components for navigation elements to ensure consistency with the design system.

requirements.summary: Implement modern, vibrant Indian-inspired design theme with warm colors and bold typography
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent color scheme applied across all pages
Typography is clear and visually appealing

file_operations.description: Update global styles with Indian-inspired color palette featuring warm colors (orange, red, yellow accents). Define CSS custom properties for primary colors, accent colors, and background tones. Include bold typography settings with appropriate font weights and sizes.

Extend Tailwind configuration to include the vibrant Indian-inspired color scheme (orange, red, yellow accents). Add custom color definitions for primary, secondary, and accent colors. Configure typography settings for bold, energetic fonts that create a friendly, social atmosphere.

Create a layout component that wraps pages with consistent design elements. Apply the warm color scheme and bold typography. Include the Navigation component to ensure consistent structure across all pages.
